articles.title_en: Ex-spy who inspired TV series ‘The Americans’ says Russia will be at war for the next ‘couple of decades’
articles.lead_en: Andrey Bezrukov, a political scientist and adviser to Rosneft chief Igor Sechin, said at the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum (SPIEF) that Russia will be at war for the next “couple of decades,” producing two generations shaped by the conflict.
